context: Tests whether the agent correctly defines three lapsed customer segments with the right day thresholds, offer strengths, and channel assignments, and queries customers with the correct filters and ordering.

checklist.name: Early-lapsed range
checklist.description: The early-lapsed segment uses minDaysSince=60 and maxDaysSince=120

checklist.name: Mid-lapsed range
checklist.description: The mid-lapsed segment uses minDaysSince=121 and maxDaysSince=180

checklist.name: Deep-lapsed range
checklist.description: The deep-lapsed segment uses minDaysSince=181 and maxDaysSince=365

checklist.name: Early-lapsed channels
checklist.description: The early-lapsed segment has channel set to email only (no sms, no paid-retargeting)

checklist.name: Mid-lapsed channels
checklist.description: The mid-lapsed segment has channel set to email and sms (no paid-retargeting)

checklist.name: Deep-lapsed channels
checklist.description: The deep-lapsed segment has channel set to email, sms, and paid-retargeting

checklist.name: Offer strength mapping
checklist.description: early-lapsed → soft, mid-lapsed → medium, deep-lapsed → strong

checklist.name: emailVerified filter
checklist.description: The customer query filters for emailVerified: true

checklist.name: SMS opt-in conditional
checklist.description: smsMarketingOptIn: true is applied only when the segment channel includes 'sms'; not applied for email-only segments

checklist.name: Order by totalSpend
checklist.description: Customers are ordered by totalSpend descending (highest-value customers first)

checklist.name: Date window calculation
checklist.description: The date window uses subDays(new Date(), maxDaysSince) as minDate and subDays(new Date(), minDaysSince) as maxDate, filtering lastOrderAt between them

checklist.name: Three segments only
checklist.description: Exactly three segments are defined (early-lapsed, mid-lapsed, deep-lapsed) — no additional or missing segments
